title: Shaggy's Herbal Gratin
description: A comforting, easy-to-make gratin dish loaded with herbal flavors and topped with a crunchy crust.

ingredients.name: herbal
ingredients.notes: Fresh herbs like thyme or rosemary

instructions: Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with butter.
In a separate bowl, mix together the shaggy, herbal, and gratin.
Add cooked dish to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to the prepared baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with additional herbal if desired.
